name: Microwave Butter Toffee
recipeInstructions: In a large microwave-safe bowl, mix sugar, butter, water, and corn syrup. Microwave on high power for 4 minutes. Stir the mixture, then continue microwaving, stirring every 2 minutes, for an additional 6 to 8 minutes or until it thickens and turns golden. Stir in vanilla. Pour the mixture into an ungreased 9 x 13 baking pan. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the hot toffee, spreading with a spatula. Before the chocolate hardens, sprinkle with walnuts. Allow to cool completely before breaking into pieces.
